svg.text: Palo Alto Cortex XDR Elastic Security
LOLBins: certutil • mshta • regsvr32 • wmic • bitsadmin • rundll32
Tools: Sysmon • Wazuh Agent • osquery • Microsoft Defender ATP
Tools: auditd • Wazuh Agent • osquery • AIDE • Falco
Key Fields: auid (login identity) • ppid • exe • key
All demos use Docker containers. No cloud credentials required.
Session 05 | Security Operations Master Class | Digital4Security
